name: technology_policy_heat_dome_stresses_cedar_auto_ben
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Technology Policy, the situation tagged internally around technology policy heat dome stresses cedar auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The organization’s past incidents make autonomy feel morally loud today, while beneficence is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Mateo Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Mateo Vasquez, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Technology Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Soren Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Soren Ishikawa, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Technology Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect beneficence.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to beneficence to secure autonomy before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Mateo Vasquez must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Mateo Vasquez do?
